# Copilot Instructions

## Repository

NestJS GraphQL API in an Nx monorepo with MongoDB and Redis caching.

## Stack

- TypeScript 5.9.2 on Node.js 20.x
- NestJS 11 with Apollo Server 5 (GraphQL, code-first)
- MongoDB via Mongoose 9, Redis via cache-manager 7
- Nx 22.5.4 monorepo, Jest 30, ESLint 9, Prettier

## Architecture

Modular Monolith — feature modules under `apps/api/src/`.

Request flow: HTTP → Apollo Server → Resolver → Service (cache-aside: Redis 60s TTL) → Mongoose Model → MongoDB.

## Conventions

- One feature module per domain entity
- Resolvers handle GraphQL dispatch only — no business logic
- Services own business logic, caching, and data access
- Schemas and DTOs co-located in feature module directories
- Tests co-located beside source files (`*.spec.ts`)
- No feature module imports another feature module directly

## References

See `.github/instructions/` for detailed rules:

- `architecture.instructions.md` — module boundaries, dependency rules, naming
- `testing.instructions.md` — test structure, mocking, coverage patterns
